steps.title: Name the central problem
steps.content: The text explains that countries define urban settlements in different ways, including different population thresholds and other factors. The final sentence states the consequence: this variation makes global comparisons difficult.

steps.title: Reject narrower claims
steps.content: B invents a universal 10,000-person standard for researchers. C focuses only on Greenland and adds a research focus not stated in the text. D contradicts the text by saying comparison is easy. The answer is A.
